Home › Brevard County › Titusville › American Restaurants

American Restaurants in Titusville

7 american restaurants in Titusville, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 1 currently hold an A, on an average 4.2-star diner rating.

7 american restaurants

  • A 91 S
    SONIC DRIVE-IN #5259 American ★ 3.5 (1538) Titusville · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Dec 2025
  • B 85 C
    CRACKER BARREL #267 American ★ 4.4 (7192) Titusville · Brevard County VegKeto +2 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • C 78 W
    WAFFLE HOUSE 475 American ★ 4.2 (1818) Titusville · Brevard County Inspected Feb 2026
  • F 56 I
    IHOP 36-183 American ★ 4.3 (3371) Titusville · Brevard County OrganicHealthy Inspected Mar 2026
  • F 44 T
    TITUSVILLE BEEF O' BRADY'S American ★ 4.1 (1268) Titusville · Brevard County DFKeto Inspected May 2026
  • F 35 L
    LOYD HAVE MERCY American ★ 4.6 (2366) Titusville · Brevard County VeganVeg Inspected May 2026
  • F 21 D
    DOGS 'R' US American ★ 4.3 (2726) Titusville · Brevard County Organic Inspected Oct 2025
